name: Banana Cake or Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sour milk (mix 1 tsp lemon juice or vinegar with regular milk to make sour milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, dissolve dry ingredients in sour milk.
2. Add the dry ingredients and mashed banana to the wet mixture.
3. Mix well until combined.
4. Optional: Fold in chopped nuts or chocolate chips if desired.
5. Pour batter into greased or paper-lined baking cups (about 2/3 full for muffins).
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
Notes:
- Double or triple the recipe for a 9x12-inch pan, or bake in an 8x8-inch pan.
- For muffins: Baking time will be shorter.
